displayTitle: The High Republic: Fear of the Jedi #5
synopsis:
Fifth and final issue from Marvel Comics The High Republic: Fear of the Jedi Miniseries
A CALL TO ARMS!
The GIOS under attack! REPUBLIC forces outnumbered and outgunned! With the BATTLE FOR ERIADU and the fate of the Republic hanging in the balance, JEDI MARSHAL KEEVE TRENNIS addresses the galaxy! The end of the war is coming, but who will pay the ultimate price?
title: The High Republic: Fear of the Jedi #5
